scripts.build:native:development:android: cd apps/native && eas build --profile development --platform android
scripts.build:native:development:ios: cd apps/native && eas build --profile development --platform ios
scripts.build:native:preview:android: cd apps/native && eas build --profile preview --platform android
scripts.build:native:preview:ios: cd apps/native && eas build --profile preview --platform ios
scripts.update:native:preview: cd apps/native && eas update --channel preview --environment preview
